description_long: This street food stall features a U-shaped counter layout with a prominent red-and-white striped canopy over the main serving area. The front counter includes a glass display case for food items, with clear 'Order' and 'Collect' sections, and a large circular logo with the word 'Crepe' and a chef illustration. The side and back counters are equipped with various utensils, containers, and small appliances, while three framed menu boards are mounted on the rear wall. The seating area is partially enclosed with a turquoise-tinted glass or acrylic barrier, providing a modern and clean look. The stall is set on a patch of artificial grass, enhancing its inviting street-side appeal.
description: A modern U-shaped street food stall with a red-and-white canopy, glass display counter, and turquoise seating area, featuring menu boards and a prominent 'Crepe' logo.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main serving counter with glass display, red-and-white canopy, 'Crepe' logo, and menu boards on the back wall.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the turquoise seating area, the length of the counter, and the rear preparation space.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the solid black back wall, partial view of the seating area, and the canopy extending over the counter.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the enclosed counter, turquoise seating, and the back of the serving area with menu boards visible.
attribute_signage: Large circular 'Crepe' logo with a chef illustration on the front counter, black and white color scheme, and three framed menu boards with text and images on the rear wall.
attribute_serving_counter: The serving counter is U-shaped, made of black laminated wood with a glass display case at the front, and features a red-and-white striped canopy overhead. It includes distinct 'Order' and 'Collect' sections and a prominent logo.
attribute_food_display: Food is displayed in a glass case at the front counter, providing clear visibility and protection, with additional containers and trays on the side counters.
